title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Banning of Unregulated Deposit Schemes Act, 2019. (2) It extends to the whole of India *except the State of Jammu and Kashmir. (3) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 21st day of February, 2019
footnote: *. Now applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh by vide notification No. S.O. 3912 (E), dated 30th October, 2019.
